redemptionType: Instant redemption to USDon; USDC redemption is instant if stablecoin swapper liquidity is available; USD bank-wire redemptions are not currently supported through Ondo Global Markets
liquidityNotes: Liquidity score is based on official instant redemption language and $1 minimum redemption through Ondo Global Markets, but USDC redemption is conditional on stablecoin swapper liquidity. On-chain secondary liquidity is much smaller than total asset value, so institutional liquidity depends primarily on issuer redemption rather than DEX depth.
